title: cremanthodium humile
intro: Cremanthodium humile, also known as the alpine ragwort, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cremanthodium humile include soothing digestive issues, relieving respiratory problems, and aiding in the treatment of skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
